category_sources: source_facts.description says it is head/tail for structured data; official docs.rs page describes structure-aware previews for JSON, YAML, text, and source files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide headson.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official docs.rs documentation page; docs.rs page provides detailed usage and API documentation for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kantord/headson, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies structured-data head/tail behavior; source_facts.executables lists hson; official docs describe JSON/YAML/text previews.
